summary: This is a brief announcement post about two upcoming events. O'Neil shares that the Alternative Banking group has published a second Huffington Post essay critiquing the bank bailout's effectiveness and warning about future bailouts. She also announces she'll be giving an invited MAA talk at the Joint Math Meetings in San Antonio titled 'Making the Case for Data Journalism.'
key_points: The Alternative Banking group published an essay arguing the bailout didn't work and another financial crisis is being prepared
O'Neil is giving an invited MAA talk on data journalism at the Joint Math Meetings
She encourages math conference attendees to stay through Monday and offers to meet up with readers
money_quotes: The bailout isn't over, how it didn't work, and how we're already preparing for the next one.
I honestly feel like I don't know too many mathematicians anymore, so it would be nice to see or meet a friendly face.
key_insight: A short logistical post announcing a critique of ongoing bailout policies and an upcoming academic talk on data journalism.
